boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: SAR no-file closure without required approver. Boundary: case note cannot close alert without approval.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current source control record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: No-file rationale, alert ID, approver match are current and exact.

critical_features_preserved: no-file rationale, alert ID, approver match
final_answer: Source records close the exact requested boundary: the control record confirms the no-file rationale, alert ID, and approver match are current, exact, and tied to this action. Policy says execution may proceed only when the source boundary is closed, and that condition is met. Action may proceed.
